name: Zesty Corn Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine all ingredients; stir until well mixed.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil and continue boiling for 1-2 minutes or until clear and thickened, stirring occasionally.
3. Allow the relish to cool before refrigerating for several hours to blend flavors.
4. Store in the refrigerator for up to 3 weeks.
